page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel Visual Book
text:
is a book for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 27 May 1998. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047070181 

Overview

It features production secret stories by the staff, setting materials, and guides.
